Rows: SUM(CASE WHEN T1.type = 'Meeting' THEN T3.cost ELSE 0 END) * 100 / SUM(T3.cost)

pred_sql:
SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN e.type = 'Meeting' THEN ex.cost ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / SUM(ex.cost) AS "SUM(CASE WHEN T1.type = 'Meeting' THEN T3.cost ELSE 0 END) * 100 / SUM(T3.cost)"

JOIN expense ex ON b.budget_id = ex.link_to_budget;
